Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Looks like he's a little worn out. He went to bed without changing out of his uniform.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Other than that, nothing has changed since last night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Even those who have the potential tend to be unstable at first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}This subject is rather unique. He hasn't exhibited any of the common symptoms.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}But... we're treating him like a guinea pig.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Oh, don't look at it like that. The two of you are classmates, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Consider it an opportunity to have someone your own age here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Besides, we need all the help we can get.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You're not gonna believe it! This thing is huge![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Unfortunately, it's chasing after me right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I'm almost back. Just letting you know in advance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Does that mean... he's bringing that thing here!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}That's enough observation for now. We need to prepare for combat![n]{f 1 1}
